summary: Tested all new features: Wishlist, Coupon system, Gallery, Social Share, Recently Viewed, Stock Notify, Sitemap, SEO Helmet. Fixed critical Helmet error in ProductDetailPage. 11/12 backend tests pass.

minor.issue: No email format validation - accepts 'not-email' with 200 OK instead of 422

ui_bugs.issue: react-helmet-async v3 error: <title>{product.name} | MotoProf</title> creates array children instead of single string. Fixed by changing to template literal: <title>{`${product.name} | MotoProf`}</title>. Also added fallback || '' for description meta.

test_results.navbar_heart_icon: PASS - Heart icon visible in navbar linking to /favoriler
test_results.product_card_wishlist_btn: PASS - 12 wishlist buttons found on product listing page (data-testid=wishlist-btn-{id})
test_results.wishlist_toggle: PASS - Clicking wishlist button fills heart red (localStorage state)
test_results.coupon_MOTO10_discount: PASS - MOTO10 applied 43.40₺ discount (10% of 434₺) with toast notification
test_results.invalid_coupon_error: PASS (backend) - 404 returned for invalid coupon codes
test_results.product_gallery_3_images: PASS - 3 thumbnail images visible below main product image
test_results.share_whatsapp_btn: PASS - data-testid=share-whatsapp-btn found on product detail
test_results.share_copy_btn: PASS - data-testid=share-copy-btn found on product detail
test_results.stock_notify_form: NOT TESTABLE - All demo products have stock > 0. Backend API tested and works. UI code correct (shows when stock === 0)
test_results.recently_viewed: PASS - 'Son Baktıklarınız' section appears after visiting multiple products
test_results.helmet_title: PASS (after fix) - Title correctly set to 'Honda PCX 125 Ön Fren Balata Takımı (15-17) | MotoProf'

action_items: Add email format validation to POST /api/stock-notify endpoint (currently accepts invalid email strings)
Consider adding out-of-stock demo products for stock notification UI testing
critical_code_review_comments: react-helmet-async v3 requires template literals for title tag - JSX expression + text node creates array children which is invalid

success_rate.frontend: 95% (Helmet fix applied, stock notify UI not testable due to all products in stock)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All major new features working: wishlist (localStorage), coupon (MOTO10/KARGO50/ILKALIS/WELCOME), gallery, social share, recently viewed, sitemap. Helmet bug was fixed (react-helmet-async v3 needs template literals in title). Stock notify UI untestable as all demo products have stock > 0 - backend API works fine.
